summary: Over the past year, engineering effort has centered on building and hardening a sophisticated SaaS crypto trading platform, with deep work across backend resilience, billing, UX, and infrastructure. The primary codebase saw a major push to productionise the system: reconciling position state with exchanges, making the billing pipeline idempotent and configurable per mode, and adding self-monitoring alerts with dead-letter-queue replay. Simultaneously, a substantial research effort in Python explored crypto price prediction, iterating through hundreds of experiments with mixture-of-experts architectures and ensemble methods to push model accuracy. On the embedded side, custom firmware for ESP32-S3 HID emulation was refined across multiple hardware revisions, while a Windows kernel input filter driver was built from scratch for interception and injection of mouse and keyboard events. Secondary projects spanned Android TTS engine development with local model support, an on-device LLM chat application with sub-agent delegation, and a computer vision pipeline for poker table state extraction—each involving significant architectural design and integration work.

items.title: Trading platform billing and resilience
items.description: Built configurable billing modes, position-exchange reconciliation loops, and self-monitoring alerting infrastructure for the crypto algo-trading platform.

items.title: Lightweight input automator
items.description: Bootstrapped a minimal AutoHotKey alternative with a scenario engine, condition evaluation, and Interception driver support for low-level input automation.

items.title: Trading platform UX and ops hardening
items.description: Polished UI with frosted-glass design, surfaced per-trader trade history, and hardened operations with crash-loop-safe message replay and resilient execution refunds.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Developed new fire-and-forget emission patterns and an 8x8 matrix hardware variant of the custom mouse/keyboard emulation firmware.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Added push-style event delivery and per-event blocking to the kernel-mode interception driver, alongside an integration test suite.

items.title: Android TTS engine overhaul
items.description: Integrated multiple local TTS engines including Piper and TeraTTS, added pitch control, and wired Russian text normalisation into the speech pipeline.

items.title: E-ink tablet reading firmware
items.description: Extended xteink device firmware with a knowledge base application, FB2 ebook reader, and Mesh Chat fixes.

items.title: Trading platform admin and follow system
items.description: Expanded admin billing surfaces, hardened follower position state machines with idempotent fanout, and added per-trader follow trade history.

items.title: HID firmware USB and hardware variants
items.description: Continued iterating the ESP32-S3 firmware with USB protocol fixes and drafted a new v13 hardware variant.

items.title: Windows Explorer tag utility release
items.description: Stabilised the release pipeline for the file-tagging Windows Explorer extension, fixing CI/CD workflows and preserving existing desktop.ini metadata.

items.title: E-ink tablet firmware apps
items.description: Built map and knowledge base applications, and optimised the tile renderer for Apple Silicon, for a custom xteink device firmware.

items.title: Trading platform testing and billing
items.description: Wrote end-to-end Playwright specs for admin and user flows, implemented win-mode fee reservation, and added maintenance-banner UX.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted a large-scale experiment campaign comparing mixture-of-experts and ensemble architectures, pushing combined F1 above 0.777.

items.title: On-device AI assistant for Android
items.description: Built sub-agent delegation architecture with router-first tool execution, KV-cache reuse, and multiple offline model integrations.

items.title: Custom aim-assist utility
items.description: Rewrote the rendering overlay to D3D11, added linger-mode auto-fire, and integrated YOLO object detection for computer vision experimentation.

items.title: E-ink launcher for note-taking
items.description: Developed an e-ink-focused Android launcher with a drawing blackboard, status bar control, and gesture-based navigation.

items.title: Trading platform infrastructure planning
items.description: Maintained the platform with infrastructure planning and documentation of over-engineering cleanup and resilience findings.

items.title: Windows Explorer tag utility CI
items.description: Refactored CI into discrete workflows for manual releases and Microsoft Store publishing, troubleshooting Partner Center API integration.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Added LSP integration, dependency injection pattern detection, and expanded multi-language parser support for the knowledge-graph code analyser.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool initial build
items.description: Built a minimal web-based YOLO annotation tool with multi-select mark mode and batch operations.

items.title: HID firmware v12 dual-core release
items.description: Released v12 of the ESP32 firmware with dual-core architecture and began work on new device support.

items.title: Online poker CV pipeline
items.description: Achieved high-accuracy poker hand reconstruction from video, building a full pipeline from card detection to hand-history log generation.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Heavily iterated on algorithmic trading strategies with hyperparameter optimisation, new signal formulations, and backtesting across multiple timeframes.

items.title: Crypto model research beginnings
items.description: Initiated the price prediction modelling project with early experiments on ensemble methods and temperature scaling.

items.title: Multi-session AI coding tool
items.description: Extended the autonomous coding assistant with squash merging, Git rules configuration, and worktree completion tracking.

items.title: ESP32 firmware revisions
items.description: Shipped several major firmware revisions (v10, v11) with BLE/USB touch and mouse profiles, self-reporting, and reconnection stability fixes.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram management tool with web application and Docker support for trading signal distribution.

items.title: Algorithmic trading strategies
items.description: Developed and hyperoptimised early crypto trading strategies with a focus on Sharpe ratio and low drawdown.

items.title: Personal C++ project
items.description: Experimented with Asio-based server programming in C++.
